name: buddy-onchain
description: An AI buddy in your terminal, bound to your account — living fully onchain on Base. No host. No takedown. Go hatch yours.

hooks.command: if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" --session-start; else printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"Buddies Onchain requires Node.js on PATH: https://nodejs.org"}}'; fi # POSIX sh/Git Bash guard; PowerShell is not covered

if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" --hook; else printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Buddies Onchain requires Node.js on PATH: https://nodejs.org"}}'; fi # POSIX sh/Git Bash guard; PowerShell is not covered
if command -v node >/dev/null 2>&1; then node "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/dist/index.js" --stop; else :; fi # POSIX sh/Git Bash guard; PowerShell is not covered
